name: quilltap-shell
description: Electron desktop shell for the Quilltap server

scripts.electron:dev: npm run electron:compile && cross-env ELECTRON_DEV=1 electron dist-electron/main.js
scripts.electron:build:mac: npm run electron:stage-lima && npm run electron:compile && npm run electron:rebuild-native && electron-builder --mac
scripts.electron:build:mac:dev: npm run electron:stage-lima && npm run electron:compile && npm run electron:rebuild-native && CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --mac -c.mac.identity=null
scripts.electron:build:win: npm run electron:compile && npm run electron:rebuild-native && electron-builder --win
scripts.electron:build:linux: npm run electron:compile && npm run electron:rebuild-native && electron-builder --linux
